Package index

All functions

censor_worker()
mgsub_censor worker
fast_replace()
Fast escape replace
filter_overlap()
Filter overlaps from matches
filter_overlap_base()
Filter overlaps from matches using only base R functionality
get_matches()
Get all matches
get_matches_base()
Get all matches using only base R functionality
mgsub()
Safe, multiple gsub
mgsub_censor()
Safe, multiple censoring of text strings
worker()
mgsub worker
